perimenopause_wellness.name: Perimenopause & Women's Wellness
perimenopause_wellness.viewer_persona: A woman in her 40s to mid-50s who feels like a stranger in her own life. Her mood shifts without warning. She is exhausted in a way sleep does not fix. She loves her family but feels invisible inside it. She would not describe herself as struggling. She would say she is just going through a lot right now.

ai_companion.name: AI Companion
ai_companion.viewer_persona: A woman in her late 30s to early 50s who is the emotional centre of everyone around her but has no one to fill that role for her. She is highly functioning. She helps everyone. She carries things alone. She would be quietly curious about an AI that simply listens with no advice, no judgment, no one to worry about in return.

womens_mental_health.name: Women's Mental Health
womens_mental_health.viewer_persona: A woman 25 to 45 who has been told her feelings are too much for most of her life. She overthinks at night. She rehearses conversations. She apologises reflexively. She knows something is not quite right but does not feel she deserves help because others have it worse.

anxiety_sos.name: Anxiety & SOS Relief
anxiety_sos.viewer_persona: A woman who knows what anxiety feels like from the inside but does not match the clinical description. Her anxiety looks like hypervigilance, people-pleasing, difficulty resting. She is functional. She is also exhausted in a very specific way she cannot explain to people who have not felt it.
